notes: Three structural issues require revision before proceeding to design: (1) Direction A (BSS on CIFAR-10) vs Direction B (FM1/FM2 on DATE-LM) inconsistency between project.md and problem-statement.md must be resolved with explicit direction choice; (2) DATE-LM Pilot (RepSim vs TRAK on toxicity filtering, ~6 GPU-hours) must be executed as kill-or-go gate before design -- all current evidence is CIFAR-10 where FM1 is mild and FM2 absent; (3) Critical literature gaps (RIF, BIF) that directly challenge the 'parameter space structurally limited' narrative must be addressed. If DATE-LM Pilot fails, fallback to Direction A (BSS diagnostic, ~14 GPU-hours to complete).
